item.title: Fascinating laboratory demonstrations in action
item.description: Discover foundational concepts of physics and chemistry through safe and engaging laboratory demonstrations designed to spark scientific curiosity.

media:content.media:title: Fascinating laboratory demonstrations in action
media:content.media:description: Discover foundational concepts of physics and chemistry through safe and engaging laboratory demonstrations designed to spark scientific curiosity.

item.title: Climbing a wall with nano tape
item.description: I try to climb a wall with nano tape!

media:content.media:title: Climbing a wall with nano tape
media:content.media:description: I try to climb a wall with nano tape!

item.title: Why hot wax is so dangerous
item.description: A simple science explanation of why hot wax can cause serious burns

media:content.media:title: Why hot wax is so dangerous
media:content.media:description: A simple science explanation of why hot wax can cause serious burns

item.title: Fly vs. Spider in a vacuum chamber
item.description: Make your guess first, then watch how changing pressure affects a fly and a spider in a vacuum chamber.

media:content.media:title: Fly vs. Spider in a vacuum chamber
media:content.media:description: Make your guess first, then watch how changing pressure affects a fly and a spider in a vacuum chamber.

item.title: Chicken head tracking
item.description: The incredible biological physics of chicken head tracking

media:content.media:title: Chicken head tracking
media:content.media:description: The incredible biological physics of chicken head tracking

item.title: The twin paradox made visible
item.description: A science experiment makes the twin paradox easier to picture, turning a tricky physics idea into a clear visual demonstration.

media:content.media:title: The twin paradox made visible
media:content.media:description: A science experiment makes the twin paradox easier to picture, turning a tricky physics idea into a clear visual demonstration.

item.title: They call me the Tin Man
item.description: In this video I grow metal out of the tip of my finger. I show you how to grow tin dendrites, then I take it a step further and see if I can actually use electrolysis and use my finger as the electrode and make tin metal grow right out of the tip of my finger!

media:content.media:title: They call me the Tin Man
media:content.media:description: In this video I grow metal out of the tip of my finger. I show you how to grow tin dendrites, then I take it a step further and see if I can actually use electrolysis and use my finger as the electrode and make tin metal grow right out of the tip of my finger!

item.title: Can a fly survive inside an absolute pressure void?
item.description: Can a fly survive inside an absolute pressure void?

media:content.media:title: Can a fly survive inside an absolute pressure void?
media:content.media:description: Can a fly survive inside an absolute pressure void?

item.title: We finally understand how birds fly
item.description: In this video I show you how a plane and a bird fly with similar but different mechanisms.

media:content.media:title: We finally understand how birds fly
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how a plane and a bird fly with similar but different mechanisms.

item.title: Air pressure reveal! Guess how it works
item.description: Watch the air-pressure reveal before you guess how it works
